hero.heading: I find method in the madness.

whoIAm.body: A brand solutions person who's spent two MBA years getting obsessed with one question: why do people actually choose what they choose? I turn briefs into ideas, and ideas into decks that hold up in a room full of people paid to say no.

whatYourScreeningFor.tag: what you're probably actually screening for
whatYourScreeningFor.body: Not a list of tools. You're looking for someone who can sit in messy, contradictory consumer data and walk out with the one insight worth building a campaign around — and who you'd actually want in the room when the client pushes back.

process.heading: The process behind every deck
process.subheading: This part runs better with sound on. Music is non-negotiable for how I think — so here's the actual playlist mood, and the four steps it plays under.

eureka.heading: Eureka!
eureka.subheading: The decks the room said yes to. Budget approved, work shipped.

bloodSweatLearning.subheading: These didn't close. They still taught me more than most of the ones that did.
